name: Curried Seafood Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vinegar, honey, curry powder, and oil in a blender.
2. Blend until smooth, gradually adding the oil to ensure a creamy consistency.
3. Toss the blended mixture with lettuce, spinach, celery, cucumber pieces, shrimp, crab meat, coconut, almonds, and raisins.
